title: SK Hynix debuts on Wall Street with a 13% rise in the largest foreign IPO in the US
summary: The South Korean semiconductor company raises $26.5 billion and reaches a market cap of $1.2 trillion.

title: Apollo buys easyJet for £5.7 billion after outbidding Castlelake
summary: The low-cost airline accepts the improved offer from private equity firm Apollo.

title: Meta launches its own AI chip and value surges 22% on lower infrastructure costs
summary: Zuckerberg's company begins production of its in-house chip, and investors celebrate cost reduction.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for theft of trade secrets
summary: The tech company accuses OpenAI of hiring a former executive who stole confidential documents.

title: Shein gets green light from China for its long-awaited IPO
summary: The textile giant overcomes regulatory veto and will be able to list on the stock market.

title: Tensions with Iran drive up oil and shake global markets
summary: Brent surpasses $76 as the US resumes negotiations but warns the ceasefire is over.

title: Ibex 35 falls 2.3% weekly, weighed down by situation in the Middle East
summary: The Spanish index cuts losses at the end of the week but accumulates a weekly drop of 2.3%.

title: Micron to invest $250 billion in developing memory chips for AI
summary: CEO Sanjay Mehrotra announces the company's largest expansion plan to meet AI demand.

title: SpaceX receives highest Wall Street price target
summary: An analysis suggests a $10,000 investment could multiply if the forecast is met.

title: Shohei Ohtani misses All-Star Game due to left knee inflammation
summary: The Japanese star apologizes to fans as he recovers from the injury.

title: Ryanair plane loses window in flight with passenger partially ejected
summary: In an incident in Greece, a Boeing window detaches and a passenger is injured.

title: Rocket Lab reveals new technology that will change the space game
summary: The aerospace company presents a significant advance in its launch systems.

title: IEA warns that slow electrification in Europe is a 'grave mistake'
summary: The head of the International Energy Agency urges acceleration of the energy transition.

title: New York bans companies from using subscription traps
summary: Companies must obtain explicit consent before automatically renewing contracts.

title: SEC requires activist investors to disclose their clients in filings
summary: The securities commission tightens transparency in shareholder activism campaigns.

title: Ukraine attacks Russian shadow fleet with drones
summary: Attacks hit 40% of vessels transporting Russian oil evading sanctions.

title: Yen strengthens to 161.7 per dollar after comments from Minister Katayama
summary: The Japanese currency appreciates on the possibility of currency intervention.

title: Judge flags 'red flags' in Elon Musk's deal with SEC
summary: The court expresses concerns about the agreement reached between the regulator and the businessman.

title: Vodafone rises 12% in stock market after Xavier Niel's entry
summary: The French billionaire acquires a significant stake in the British operator.

title: Bayer sells its contraceptive business to Apollo for €3 billion
summary: The German pharmaceutical company cedes its women's health division to the private equity firm.
